payload.answer: Saved the article reference and the stated reason, but the article content could not be fetched because the mock fetch result was a 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity resolution was needed; the input only provided a URL reference and a user-supplied reason.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the article at https://example.com/missing for the reason: useful for memory architecture.

details: Committed the URL reference and user-stated reason only.
Did not extract claims from the article content because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

repair_options: Provide a working URL or archived copy.
